note: Snapshot of the legacy Metro dish menu. Prices in integer bani (1 leu = 100 bani). Drink prices are BASE prices — the Romanian SGR deposit (sgrDepositBani per container) is added at cart time, per owner decision 2026-07-04 (02-clarify.md Q7). Owner may hand-edit before seeding.
